title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions!
